title: Principal Plant Manager at Voltas Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Voltas Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas Digital Technologies:
Voltas Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas Digital Technologies!
